params.name: A Burial At Ornans
params.description:
On Dec 23, 1849 AD, Courbet began creating this painting, "A Burial At Ornans."
The painting was created by French realist painter Courbet, depicting the scene he witnessed at his grandfather's funeral. He portrayed the characters in the scene in a straightforward and realistic manner, with each character as detailed and unique as a portrait. This level of detail and uniqueness sets the painting apart even within the realm of realist art.
